uplink.description: TTN example uplink: standard heat-meter message (energy 106895 kWh, volume 2013.06 m3, power 4.047 kW)
uplink._note: Upstream example input; expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (energy/volume/power: kWh,m3,kW x1000 -> Wh,L,W). flow/flowTemperature/returnTemperature/serial/errorFlag are heat-meter extras.

uplink.description: Synthetic in-bounds standard message (energy 5000 kWh, volume 1000 m3, power 5 kW, temps 60/30 C)
uplink._note: Hand-built standard frame with same record layout as the TTN example, distinct in-bounds DIF/VIF values; expected.data verified against reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: Payload shorter than 40 bytes is rejected
uplink._note: Upstream rejects payloads under 40 bytes (the standard format is fixed length); mirrors the upstream length gate.
Only fPort 2 carries the standard heat-meter message; any other port is an error per upstream.
